---
title: "Einar Paz"
subtitle: "PhD Student in Economics"
---

:::: {.home-intro}

::: {.home-text}

Welcome!

I am a PhD student in Economics at [The University of Texas at Austin](https://liberalarts.utexas.edu/economics/){target="_blank"}.

My research interests are in macroeconomics, behavioral macroeconomics, monetary economics, and labor economics.

<!-- [Research](research.qmd) · [Curriculum Vitae](cv.pdf){target="_blank"} -->

:::

::: {.home-photo}

![](images/profile.jpg){.profile-photo fig-alt="Professional portrait of Einar Paz"}

:::

::::

## Contact

Department of Economics  
The University of Texas at Austin  
Austin, Texas

Email: [einarpaz@utexas.edu](mailto:einarpaz@utexas.edu)

::: {.contact-links}

[Curriculum Vitae](cv.pdf){target="_blank"} ·
[LinkedIn](www.linkedin.com/in/einar-paz-6a639aa2){target="_blank"} 
<!-- [UT Austin profile](YOUR-UT-PROFILE-ADDRESS){target="_blank"} -->

:::
